query_text: a confidence-inspiring ski for someone who skis fast but wants to feel safe

results.explanation: Volkl Deacon 76. Solid frontside ski with that Volkl precision. The titanal layers give it real dampness and stability. Edge grip on hardpack is excel
Line Blade. The Line Blade is a hidden gem. Maple and metal construction gives it a unique combo of liveliness and dampness. Edge grip is outstanding
DPS Pagoda Tour 112 RP. The Pagoda Tour 112 RP is the ultimate powder touring ski. At 112mm waist with full rocker, the float is unmatched. The carbon
Fischer RC One 82 GT. Solid advanced frontside ski. The 82mm waist is wide enough for some versatility but narrow enough for real carving. Titanal con
Head Easy Joy SLR. Literally my first day skiing and these were so easy to use. Super soft flex, very light, and the rocker tip makes turning almost a
Head Supershape e-Speed. The Supershape line is the gold standard for expert carving. The e-Speed takes it up a notch with the electronic dampening. I

K2 Disruption 78C. Perfect ski for my level. The K2 Disruption 78C is forgiving enough for my mistakes but has enough edge grip for confident turns. T
Elan Ripstick 96. The Ripstick 96 is the perfect width for all-mountain skiing. Wide enough for light powder, narrow enough for quick carving on groom

ground_truth.reason: Stability 8, damp 8, forgiveness 4 — strong but not punishing, 'confidence' in reviews
